name: BIG BALLER
bio: Money walks in the door before he does — nobody still around asks where the first stack came from. Fires gold because lead was never expensive enough. Treats every pot like a refund he is owed.
power: DEEP POCKETS — built like a vault door, shrugs off hits that would fold anyone else
funFact: Has never once picked up a coin quietly.

name: YOINK
bio: If it shines, it was never yours — that is not a threat, it is a policy. Moves like the exits were memorized before the entrances. The league counts its coins twice whenever the fox is in the arena.
power: FIVE-FINGER DISCOUNT — any coin that hits the floor is already his
funFact: Three steals in a row triggers a GOLD RUSH. Ask him how he knows.

name: CHAD
bio: Doesn't dodge. On principle. Some say the principle is older than the league itself. The hammer does all the negotiating.
power: NO-DODGE POLICY — takes the hit head on and sends it back with interest
funFact: Career dodge count: zero. He checks.

name: RNGESUS
bio: Prays to nothing and wins anyway. The dice have never blinked — neither has he. Luck isn't a lady in this league, it's a payment plan.
power: LOADED LUCK — the odds always seem to land on his side of the table
funFact: Nobody has ever seen him blink. The dice have.

name: CHERRY BOMB
bio: Anger, but make it splash damage. Every fuse is short and every grudge is shorter. Stand back — that's not advice, it's a radius.
power: SPLASH ZONE — everything nearby explodes at least twice
funFact: Every bomb has a name. None of the names are printable.

name: RODZILLA
bio: Rage with a perimeter. The spike ring spins whether there's a fight or not — so there's usually a fight. Old scores don't get settled around here, they orbit.
power: THE RING — a halo of spikes that never, ever stops spinning
funFact: The flail keeps spinning after the match ends. Nobody asks it to stop.

name: ZOOMER
bio: Faster than your attention span, and knows it. Blink twice: the first one is for the dash-in, the second is for the replay. Somewhere out there a storm wants its spear back.
power: LIGHTSPEED — closes the gap faster than the camera can pan
funFact: Once finished a taunt before starting it. Unconfirmed, but nobody dares confirm it.

name: FAX
bio: Steals your homework and grades it F. Every trick in the league is on file — copied, catalogued, improved out of spite. Sources say FAX knows things. FAX confirms nothing.
power: MIRROR MATCH — borrows your best move and returns it worse. For you.
funFact: Keeps a copy of every fighter's signature weapon. All graded F.

name: GIOVANNI
bio: A hood, two green slits, and a firewall nobody has cracked twice. Spends the winnings on manga and the silences on typing. INFORMATICS!
power: FIREWALL — the first hit always bounces. ACCESS DENIED.
funFact: His prize gold is filed under "manga budget".

name: XIXXIO
bio: Literally a smiley face — the same smile in every photo, and he is in EVERY photo. Was that XIXXIO at the edge of the frame? Nobody can say — everyone blinked. Spotted?
funFact: Check the corner of the shot. Now check it again.

name: SDRUMO
bio: Speaks exactly one word and means all of them: miao. The keyboard lost that fight years ago. Runs on pure tilt — full tilt, no brakes.
power: ??? — full tilt is not a mood, it's a gear

name: MUSASHO
bio: Two swords from a Live Lands dojo nobody streams anymore. Speaks only in aphorisms, moves only when it is already over. You flinched. It was enough.
power: IAI — he stops, he waits, and the cut has already happened
funFact: The second sword has never been drawn. Fans keep the count: zero.

name: D.MONKEY
bio: A brown monkey with enormous ears, a blond fringe and a permanent appraiser’s grimace. Collects what nobody else can find. The shelf has exactly one gap left — shaped like the GRAIL FIGURE. Will it be filled? PER FORZA!
funFact: The GRAIL FIGURE stays sealed in the box. Obviously.

name: THEKING
bio: A crown, a stream, and a floating ticker counting subscribers in real time. Every battle is content. ABBONATEVI!
funFact: When the content hits, he declares it GAS. Highest rating on record: GASATISSIMO.
